description: Non-release manual / private firmware artifact candidates. Drives the workflow_dispatch-only .github/workflows/manual-firmware-artifacts.yml lane that compiles the FanRelay / FanPWM / FanDAC manual / no-WebFlash candidates and uploads ONLY temporary, expiring GitHub Actions artifacts for point-to-point operator handoff. This lane is explicitly non-release: it never creates a GitHub Release, never writes firmware/sources.json or manifest.json, never commits a .bin / checksum / build-info file, never sets a release channel, never reuses a product-catalog artifact_name, never adds a WebFlash wrapper, and never flips webflash_build_matrix. See docs/manual-install-fan-candidates.md and docs/product-readiness-matrix.md §MANUAL-FIRMWARE-ARTIFACT-POLICY-001.

preview_policy.note: These three fan-driver candidates are the FanRelay / FanPWM / FanDAC PREVIEW-tier RELEASE targets enumerated in config/preview-release-targets.json. Under RELEASE-PREVIEW-WEBFLASH-ALL-BUILDABLE-001 they are the 'manual-preview' delivery lane: this lane IS how their tester-facing preview .bin is produced and handed over, so they are real preview release targets, not passive 'manual-candidate-only / not releasable' candidates. Preview / manual-preview WebFlash import is now ELIGIBLE for these fan drivers (RELEASE-PREVIEW-FAN-WEBFLASH-ELIGIBILITY-001, recorded in config/preview-release-targets.json) as an Advanced-install-only, acknowledgement-gated preview import. The committed one-click import row stays out: the fan-token guardrail (scripts/list_release_targets.py refuses a fan token in the release matrix; the catalog keeps webflash_build_matrix=false) keeps fan drivers out of config/webflash-builds.json (so webflash_importable stays false here), and the actual WebFlash-side committed import is the separately queued downstream follow-up (WEBFLASH-RELAY-001 / WEBFLASH-PWM-001 / WEBFLASH-DAC-001, imported by WF-IMPORT-RELAY-001 / WF-IMPORT-PWM-001 / WF-IMPORT-DAC-001). This CI lane stays non-release in the durable sense (release:false / webflash:false / release_channel:null): no GitHub Release, no firmware/sources.json, no manifest.json, no committed .bin, no WebFlash wrapper, no webflash_build_matrix flip. The targets remain not stable, not recommended, not a default, and carry no compliance claim.

candidates.stable_blocker: Mains-safety / installation-approval / creepage / clearance evidence + competent-person sign-off + GPIO3 strap-pin boot characterisation.
candidates.caveat: mains / safety / competent-person sign-off still required; not kit / default / recommended

candidates.stable_blocker: Measured current / thermal evidence (S360-311-CURRENT-THERMAL-001); RPM / TachIO not claimed.
candidates.caveat: no RPM / TachIO claim; measured current / thermal still required

candidates.stable_blocker: Cloudlift S12 / J3 harness + product-bench evidence; S360-312 schematic / BOM.
candidates.caveat: not Cloudlift-ready; J3 / Cloudlift evidence still required; no compliance claim
